content.text: i like raindrops on roses and whiskers on kittens,
also wild geese that fly with the moon on their wings.
I love getting outside and doing sick sh*t.
Here are some photos of said sh*t.
you can see how I made this
This is my personal website that serves as a general representation of my mind; projects I'm working on, things I like, and whatever else I want on the internet forever.
I figure here is where I will write something about my love for all the shit i do outside. For now here is a placeholder
I'll add more here later, but the house is coming along
Here we see Spencer with the craziest crib hand of his life.
this is an infinite canvas built on the tldraw sdk
Follow this arrow to important links
that means you can scroll anywhere to see more stuff
